about_p1: I'm Juaquin A. Gonzalez, a freelance web developer originally from Formosa, Argentina, currently based in Spain. I work remotely with people who want to bring their entrepreneurial projects into the IT world.
about_p2: I consider myself a lifelong learner — in this industry, growth never stops. I'm self-taught, fast in execution, and I enjoy close collaboration with clients to ensure the final product is exactly what they envisioned, with that personal touch that makes all the difference.
edu1_text: Full Stack Jr. Web Developer program. Comprehensive training in web development: languages, design and real-world complex projects.
edu2_text: Technical degree in Automation & Robotics. Core concepts in computing, electronics and mechanics applied through real projects.
